references.role: structural Licorn kitchen context for every Seedance segment
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the global Licorn kitchen layout, cabinet relationships, lighting, and material identity. It is not a mandatory camera framing.

references.role: active overhead island view for prep, assembly, sauce, and final bowl macro shots
references.prompt: Use to preserve the light terrazzo island surface and overhead shot geometry for precise food placement.

references.role: active final hero island view with Licorn character and bowl
references.prompt: Use for final hero framing and countertop material continuity. Keep the bowl foreground hero.

references.role: active close induction view for rice steam, blanching, egg frying, and beef searing
references.prompt: Use to keep the same flush black induction plate. Never show flame, gas rings, or a redesigned stovetop.

references.role: Licorn character identity when hands or final satisfied character appear
references.prompt: Use for character identity only; do not redesign the character.

references.role: satisfied expression reference for final hero ending
references.prompt: Use only to preserve a pleased, satisfied expression in the ending.

references.role: top-down visible hands for spoon, prep, and placement actions
references.prompt: Use only for hand and arm pose continuity in overhead actions.

references.role: three-quarter presentation pose for the final hero shot
references.prompt: Use only for final presentation posture behind the bowl.

references.role: spoon for sauce, yolk break, serving rice, and final bite lift
references.prompt: Use for spoon shape only. Avoid floating spoon by showing visible hand or clear support.

references.role: covered saucepan for rice steam reveal
references.prompt: Use for saucepan shape during rice absorption and steam reveal.

references.role: small whisk for marinade or sauce mixing
references.prompt: Use for mixing liquid marinade or sauce only.

references.role: straining utensil for blanched vegetables
references.prompt: Use for draining blanched vegetables; do not use as a cooking pan.

references.role: hot vegetable and beef movement utensil
references.prompt: Use for hot food handling; avoid cloth-in-hand transfer.

references.role: rigid supported transfer utensil for placing the fried egg
references.prompt: Use for supported fried egg transfer into the bowl. Do not use the flexible silicone spatula for rigid transfer.

references.role: flexible pan tossing and scraping utensil for sauté and sear shots
references.prompt: Use for pan tossing or scraping only; do not use for deep-fry retrieval or rigid portion lifting.

references.role: finished bibimbap radial topology for hook, assembly target, final gloss, and hero continuity
references.prompt: Generate a vertical food reference image of one Korean bibimbap hero bowl viewed overhead on a light terrazzo Licorn kitchen island. Bowl is 16-18 cm diameter, rice covers the bottom, 5-6 distinct topping wedges remain separated: spinach, soybean sprouts, green beans, carrot julienne, glossy beef strips with onion arcs, one normal fried egg centered. Add a few white sesame seeds and a small red-brown chili-sesame sauce accent. Not oversized, not miniature, not fully mixed, no text.

references.role: fried egg with intact glossy yolk and controlled yolk-break target
references.prompt: Generate a close food reference of one normal fried egg for bibimbap: white set, edge lightly opaque, yolk centered, domed, glossy and intact, with a second small inset or visual cue of the yolk just beginning to flow when touched by a spoon. No scrambled egg, no hard-boiled egg, no oversized yolk, no text.

references.role: raw marinated beef strip scale and soy-sesame gloss
references.prompt: Generate a close food reference of rumsteck beef cut into thin strips, each 0.5-1 cm wide and 4-6 cm long, coated in dark glossy soy-sesame marinade with tiny garlic and ginger flecks. Strips remain separate, not minced, not a whole steak, not oversized, no text.

references.role: seared beef strips with onions for plating wedge
references.prompt: Generate a close food reference of Korean-style seared beef strips with browned edges, glossy soy-sesame coating, and pale translucent onion arcs. Beef strips remain 0.5-1 cm wide and 4-6 cm long, separate and tender, not minced, not steak cubes, not burnt black, no text.

references.role: separated bibimbap vegetable families and color-zone guardrail
references.prompt: Generate an overhead food reference of prepared bibimbap vegetables in separate neat piles on the Licorn kitchen island: glossy spinach, pale soybean sprouts, short green beans, bright orange carrot julienne. Each family stays separate, no mixed salad, no noodles, no mush, no tiny garnish drift, no text.

references.role: steamed rice grain texture for rice steam reveal
references.prompt: Generate a close food reference of freshly steamed basmati rice for bibimbap: moist white grains visible and separate, gentle steam, not sticky porridge, not dry grains, no text.
